content.en:
Soon.

Word spread about the situation in the territorial waters of Longze.

"What, there are primeval monsters that can easily devour the origin of the territorial waters and destroy the territorial waters?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

You must know that even if they are the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the Void, it will be very difficult to destroy a territorial water.

If you have territorial waters as your home and suppress foreign enemies, you can defeat them even if you are weaker.

But now, the territorial waters are easily swallowed up and destroyed, so the only advantage for cultivators is gone!

Moreover, cultivators are not like the Blood Transformation Realm race, most of the cultivators are very weak, and they can't even enter the territorial sea boundary rift, if they enter the territorial sea boundary rift, they will die directly.

The number of weak cultivators who were almost innumerable, if they lost the protection of the territorial waters, they would not be able to survive directly.

For example, if there is no Wanlong territorial waters, more than 99% of the people of the human race will die.

Ye Tian immediately contacted other Bone Transformation Realms, such as the Lord of Darkness.

Soon, he got an affirmative answer.

......

Longze territorial waters.

Ye Tian quickly came here, and at this time he saw the almost broken Longze territorial waters and some primeval monsters.

So, he struck down these primeval monsters.

And at this time, there were also some other Nine Blood Transformation Realms to support, and they quickly killed almost all the primeval monsters here.

Wow!

Ye Tian grabbed an ancient monster that could devour the origin of the territorial waters.

According to the investigation of the copying talent, he knew the name of this primeval monster - the Blood Goo Demon Spider!

The Blood Goo Demon Spider's ability to devour the origin of territorial waters is not a talent, but the instinct of this primeval monster itself, which can also be said to be a racial ability.

For the Blood Goo Demon Spider, the origin of the boundary rift in the territorial sea is a delicious food, which other primeval monsters can't eat, but they can eat it.

Click!

Ye Tian casually pinched this blood goo demon spider to death.

"Next, we have to send a replica body to patrol the Wanlong territorial sea for a long time, don't when you are in retreat, a group of blood goo demon spiders will eat the origin of the Wanlong territorial sea, but even if the Wanlong territorial sea does not collapse, it will have to be demoted!" Ye Tian muttered.

He looked at Longze's territorial waters again.

Now, this territorial sea is already in half-ruins, although it has not collapsed, but it will not exist for too long, unless they are willing to spend a huge price to repair the territorial waters of Longze, but whether they can afford this price, it is difficult to say.

Besides, now that the primeval monsters are invading, all the major forces are in danger, and the resources to repair Longze's territorial waters cannot be found or traded!

"I'm afraid that the territorial waters of Longze will not exist for long, and they will inevitably collapse!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He could help Longze's territorial waters, but he had nothing to do with Longze's territorial waters, and even if he helped them, he wouldn't be grateful to himself.

Swish!

Ye Tian left quickly.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian mainly patrolled and defended Wanlong's territorial waters and the Taixuan Sea.

this day.

A group of primeval monsters approached the territorial waters of Wanlong, but before they could approach the territorial waters of Wanlong, Ye Tian directly attacked and killed them all.

Of course.

Other territorial waters have not been so lucky.

During this period of time, news of the destruction of territorial waters continued to come.

At this time, Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh, the upgrading of the territorial sea boundary is really not a chance for the weak forces, but a disaster!

"Maybe I can make a copy of an Ancient Monster from the Bone Transformation Realm twice, and then infiltrate the Ancient Demon Abyss!"

Ye Tian had this idea.

The Bone Transformation Realm of the Territorial Sea Boundary Gap has hardly been to the Ancient Abyss, because he doesn't dare to go.

However, once the Ancient Abyss was completely defeated, those Bone Transformation Realms would definitely enter the Ancient Demon Abyss to collect resources.

"Maybe the Ancient Demon Abyss has a lot of resources that will help cultivators!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he copied a bone transformation realm primeval monster that he had killed before.

Soon.

The primeval monster copied the body and copied it.

Swish!

Ye Tian went to the Ancient Demon Abyss as a Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Monster.

Along the way, when the other primeval monsters saw Ye Tian, they wouldn't attack at all, they would only tremble, extremely respectful.

Even if they are not tall, they will submit to powerful primeval monsters.

And Ye Tian kept shuttling, and finally came to the entrance of the Ancient Demon Abyss.

There were still primeval monsters pouring in here, and Ye Tian shuttled in directly.

......

The Ancient Abyss.

Nowadays, the number of primeval monsters here is much rarer, because many primeval monsters have poured into the boundary gap of territorial waters.

He also knew why so many primeval monsters had left their bodies and headed for the territorial waters.

Because of the attraction.

Now.

He could feel the attraction from the seas of the territorial waters, as if there was something good there.

"This is the upgrade crisis, forcibly attracting the primeval monsters into the territorial sea boundary crack!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The number of primeval monsters in the primeval demon abyss is scarce, which is a good thing for him, it is easier for him to find resources, and he may not even encounter the primeval monsters of the bone transformation realm, and he can easily take away the resources here.

The wisdom of the primeval monsters is not high, but the resources that help them improve are estimated to have been eaten by them, but the resources that are useless to them must still be left, and they will not collect them.

Soon.

Ye Tian found a resource that would help him—the Ancient Hunyuan Stone!

This primeval source stone is of great help to cultivators, and it can be extracted from it, this primeval source liquid helps the bone transformation realm to quench the immeasurable bone, so that the immeasurable bone can complete the bone transformation.

As for the primeval monsters, these primeval source stones are just ordinary stones.

"It's gone!"

Ye Tian collected these primeval source stones one by one.

"Sure enough, after the upgrade crisis, there is an opportunity, if the bone transformation realm of the territorial sea boundary gap solves this crisis, after entering the Ancient Demon Abyss, you will definitely be able to see these Ancient Hunyuan Stones, and I will definitely not be able to snatch much at that time." "

"But now, these primeval source stones are all mine!"

Soon.

These primeval source stones were all collected by him.

"Let's go, let's go and see somewhere else!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Soon, he found other resources, and he collected them as well.

I have to say, there are really a lot of resources here!

Once he's collected some of the resources, he's going to send them out and come back in to look for them when the time comes.

In this way, even if this primeval monster copies its body and falls, at least the resources will not be lost!

Soon.

His primeval monster replica body came out of the primeval demon abyss, and then merged with his real replica body.
